title: Exocarpos aberrans

intro: Exocarpos aberrans, also known as the native Australian desert cherry, is a small shrub native to the arid regions of Western Australia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body.
